description: Ticket Tailor is an event ticketing platform for creating box offices, selling tickets online, and managing events, orders, attendees, and memberships. It also provides webhook notifications and an AI-oriented MCP connector for interacting with box office data and actions.
summary: tickettailor.com exposes a box-office REST API at api.tickettailor.com authenticated with a Ticket Tailor API key over HTTP Basic auth, plus an MCP server at mcp.tickettailor.ai that uses the same Ticket Tailor API key via MCP OAuth-style client authentication.
